title: NenProject
$comment: Last modified on 2026-02-20 by Hans Bot - NEN. Derived from 'NEN Content Publication V0.8.1-bundled.yaml'

nenProjectId.description: Unique identifier for the NEN project.

nenProjectReference.description: Reference code or name for the NEN project.

nenProjectURN.description: URN for the NEN project, following a specific format (i.e. urn:nen:project:12345).

lastChangeTimestamp.$comment: copied from 'cen-publications.yaml'. Personally prefer 'changeAt' for date-time properties, but keeping 'lastChangeTimestamp' for consistency with existing schemas.
lastChangeTimestamp.description: lastChangeTimestamp from at (i.e. 2018-01-01), Cannot be a date in the future.

reference.description: project's reference, exact match. This can be a code or name that uniquely identifies the project, and may include alphanumeric characters and special characters such as hyphens or underscores. (i.e. NEN-Project-2026, NEN-Project-54321).

stdNumber.description: project's standard or document 'number', which may also contain non-numeric characters, e.g. '9001'

stdPartNumber.description: project's standard or document part 'number', which may also contain non-numeric characters, e.g. '2B'

harmonizedStageCode.description: harmonizedStageCode (i.e. 60.60) cannot be used with stageCode. This will match any 'CURRENT' stage, not a 'CLOSED' stage.

stageCode.description: stageCode (i.e. 6060) cannot be used with harmonizedStageCode

stageDueDateFrom.description: stage dueDate From for PLANNED status (i.e. 2018-01-01)

stageDueDateTo.description: stage dueDate To for PLANNED status(i.e. 2018-05-31)

stageEffectiveDateFrom.description: stage effectiveDate starting with status default CURRENT starting at (i.e. 2018-01-01)

stageEffectiveDateTo.description: stage effectiveDate ending with status default CURRENT ending at (i.e. 2018-05-31)

stageStatus.description: stage status (values CURRENT, CLOSED, PLANNED), default CURRENT when a stage (effective, due, target) date is filled else empty

stageTargetDateFrom.description: stage targetDate From for PLANNED status(i.e. 2018-01-31)

stageTargetDateTo.description: stage targetDate To for PLANNED status(i.e. 2018-05-31)

nenCommitteeUrn.description: URN for the NEN committee associated with the project, following a specific format (i.e. committeeUrn=iso:committee:54158&committeeUrn=iso:committee:48138&committeeUrn=iso:committee:4559).
nenCommitteeUrn.$comment: copied from 'cen-publications.yaml'. pattern not consistent with description

nenCommitteeDisplayName.description: Display name of the NEN committee associated with the project.

$comment: The following properties were defined in the NEN Content Publication API V0.8.1-bundled.yaml'.

nenProjectId.description: Unique identifier for the NEN project.

nenProjectReference.description: Reference code or name for the NEN project.
